response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Handled lyrics from reference accurately; phonetic structures matched perfectly with the song segments. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized song lyrics from reference for Scene 1. Manual transcription was conducted for Scenes 2 and 3 as reference lyrics were absent. 3. Timing & Pacing: Tightly synchronized subtitle blocks around rapid speech and lyric delivery, splitting precisely during instrumental segments to prevent cascading delay.

subtitles.original: 名シーン chapter 苦楽を経る
subtitles.english: Famous scenes, chapters, through joys and sorrows

subtitles.original: 要 妄想 燃料 酔っ払う
subtitles.english: Needing delusion, fuel, getting drunk

subtitles.original: 今世中 達成する 成し遂げる
subtitles.english: Achieving in this life, accomplishing

subtitles.original: トラベル トラブル 闊歩ライフ
subtitles.english: Travel, trouble, strutting life

subtitles.original: I said goodbye to false gods
subtitles.english: I said goodbye to false gods

subtitles.original: But even cats hide their claws
subtitles.english: But even cats hide their claws

subtitles.original: Nobody's ever truly what they seem
subtitles.english: Nobody's ever truly what they seem

subtitles.original: With the limelight gleam to conceal the flaws
subtitles.english: With the limelight gleam to conceal the flaws

subtitles.original: I can't escape the scroll and it takes a toll on me
subtitles.english: I can't escape the scroll and it takes a toll on me

subtitles.original: Dead-end thoughts still loop and hold on me
subtitles.english: Dead-end thoughts still loop and hold on me

subtitles.original: Did it even matter in the end that I held out?
subtitles.english: Did it even matter in the end that I held out?

subtitles.original: Sorry, I could never be the god I was sold to be
subtitles.english: Sorry, I could never be the god I was sold to be

subtitles.original: So to speak, an idol in fool's gold
subtitles.english: So to speak, an idol in fool's gold

subtitles.original: Living out the role I was told to be
subtitles.english: Living out the role I was told to be

subtitles.original: I'll be old and free in a matter of centuries
subtitles.english: I'll be old and free in a matter of centuries

subtitles.original: Wondering if there was a point to me
subtitles.english: Wondering if there was a point to me

subtitles.original: Was thinking for sure I'd be long gone by now
subtitles.english: Was thinking for sure I'd be long gone by now

subtitles.original: But I found a place to belong
subtitles.english: But I found a place to belong

subtitles.original: People I can't live without
subtitles.english: People I can't live without

subtitles.original: Follow me, please この渡り廊下
subtitles.english: Follow me, please, this corridor

subtitles.original: 暗闇からの園へ
subtitles.english: To the garden from the darkness

subtitles.original: トゲすり抜けて 辿り着く
subtitles.english: Slip through the thorns and reach it

subtitles.original: Hello, hello 今宵も insomnia
subtitles.english: Hello, hello, tonight's insomnia too

subtitles.original: Let's maintain
subtitles.english: Let's maintain

subtitles.original: In a world where nothing is certain
subtitles.english: In a world where nothing is certain

subtitles.original: Except that someday we will say goodbye
subtitles.english: Except that someday we will say goodbye

subtitles.original: I wanna keep my eyes off the sky
subtitles.english: I wanna keep my eyes off the sky

subtitles.original: 砂漠みたいな味 desert
subtitles.english: Taste like a desert, desert

subtitles.original: Desert!
subtitles.english: Desert!

subtitles.original: Sorrow 孵化する未来の mercy
subtitles.english: Sorrow, hatching future's mercy

subtitles.original: 微動だにしない異彩の愛に
subtitles.english: To a unique love that doesn't budge

subtitles.original: 焦げ付くほどの hold you 抱擁と
subtitles.english: Hold you with a burning embrace

subtitles.original: Hello, hello 今宵の day dreamer
subtitles.english: Hello, hello, tonight's day dreamer

subtitles.original: Let's maintain
subtitles.english: Let's maintain

subtitles.original: Shoutは changing 喝采
subtitles.english: Shout is changing, applause

subtitles.original: 邪魔させん bashing
subtitles.english: Don't let them interfere, bashing

subtitles.original: Chanceは起死回生
subtitles.english: Chance is a revival

subtitles.original: エッサエッサ fire
subtitles.english: Essa essa fire

subtitles.original: Shoutは changing 喝采
subtitles.english: Shout is changing, applause

subtitles.original: 邪魔させん bashing
subtitles.english: Don't let them interfere, bashing

subtitles.original: Chanceは起死回生
subtitles.english: Chance is a revival

subtitles.original: エッサエッサ fire
subtitles.english: Essa essa fire

subtitles.original: みなさん！
subtitles.english: Everyone! Woo!

subtitles.original: どうでしたか？「天誅 & mercy」。
subtitles.english: How was that? 'Tenshu & mercy'.

subtitles.original: あの曲を書くことで思い出したんですけど、そう、私は今でも...
subtitles.english: Writing that song reminded me, yes, I still can...

subtitles.original: ライブでのパフォーマンスがめちゃくちゃ難しい曲を書けるんだって！
subtitles.english: ...write songs that are extremely difficult to perform live!

subtitles.original: いこうぜ！
subtitles.english: Let's go!

subtitles.original: 変わらないものもあるよね、Dead Beats。
subtitles.english: Some things never change, Dead Beats.

subtitles.original: でも、このライブの技術はどう？ちょっと待って。
subtitles.english: But, hey, how about the tech for this concert? Hold on.

subtitles.original: みんな私の後ろの桜見えてる？ディテールがさ。
subtitles.english: Are you guys seeing this sakura behind me? Like, the detail?

subtitles.original: あ、ちょっと待って。もう一回、この桜の木めちゃくちゃパワフルだよ！
subtitles.english: Oh, hold on. Sorry, again, the sakura tree is very powerful!

subtitles.original: すごく大きなアイテムだし、めちゃくちゃ詳細だし。
subtitles.english: It's such a- such a big item and so detailed.

subtitles.original: たまに動きを止めるけど、大丈夫、大したことじゃない。
subtitles.english: Sometimes I stop moving, that's okay, it doesn't matter.

subtitles.original: うおー！パチパチパチパチ！
subtitles.english: Woo! Clap clap clap clap!

subtitles.original: 10点中1000点だったよ。完璧、いこう。
subtitles.english: That was a thousand out of ten. Nailed it, let's go.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます。完璧ですね。水を飲みます。
subtitles.english: Thank you very much. That was clean. Drink water.

subtitles.original: それは本当にいいアイデアだね。
subtitles.english: That's a really good idea.

subtitles.original: 水、水、水、水...
subtitles.english: Water, water, water...

subtitles.original: 大丈夫、大丈夫。見えない水ね。
subtitles.english: It's fine, it's fine, the invisible water.

subtitles.original: でも、みんなPhantomimeの時のことを思い出すと...
subtitles.english: But, I mean, if you guys think back to Phantomime...

subtitles.original: みんながプロダクションとか品質がヤバいって話してるのをよく見かけるけど。
subtitles.english: I see a lot of you guys talking about, like, oh, the production, the quality is so crazy.

subtitles.original: このあたりは本当にパワフルなことが行われているんだ。
subtitles.english: It's very, very powerful stuff going on around here.

subtitles.original: スタッフは本当に大成功を収めてくれたよ。スタッフには本当に感謝してる。
subtitles.english: And they really knocked it out of the park with this. I just have so much thanks to give to my staff.

subtitles.original: 最後にちょっとしたクレジットロールが流れるから、スタッフのみんなに大きな拍手を。
subtitles.english: Uh, be sure- we have a little credit roll at the end that will play, and, you know, that's my staff, and big up to them.

subtitles.original: でも、Phantomimeのコンサートを覚えている？
subtitles.english: But, remember the Phantomime concert...

subtitles.original: Phantomimeのリリースに合わせてやった、あの小さなミニライブ。すごくクールだったよね。
subtitles.english: you guys, that we did, the little mini live for the release of Phantomime, which was really cool.

subtitles.original: あれはすでに、これらのショーのためのさらに優れた品質の始まりの余韻があったよね？
subtitles.english: That already had, like, the- the echoes of the beginning of even better quality for these shows, right?

subtitles.original: じゃあ、次はどうなるか想像できる？
subtitles.english: Well, can you imagine what the next is gonna look like?

subtitles.original: だって、今すでにこんな感じなんだよ。
subtitles.english: I mean, if this- if this looks like this right now,

subtitles.original: ここからどこへ行くか想像できる？考えるだけで本当にワクワクするよ。
subtitles.english: I mean, can you imagine where we go from here? I mean, it's really exciting to think about.

subtitles.original: 今から20年後のDead Beats。20年後はどうなってるかな？誰にもわからないね。
subtitles.english: 20 years from now, Dead Beats, 20 years from now, who knows?

subtitles.original: たぶんあの桜の木くらい詳細になってると思う。でも心配しないで、私らしさは残るから。
subtitles.english: I'll probably be as detailed as that sakura tree. But- but don't worry, it won't be too much, it'll still feel like me.

subtitles.original: それだけは確実にするよ。
subtitles.english: I'll- I'll make sure about that.

subtitles.original: これはもうギリギリのラインを攻めてると思うけど、もっと顔を動かしたりしたいな。
subtitles.english: This is already kind of toeing the line, I think, but I'd love to, like, move my face a little bit more and stuff like that.

subtitles.original: 葉っぱが舞い散る方が劇的かな？それはいい指摘だけど、もし...
subtitles.english: Would be more dramatic if leaves were scattering around? That's a good point, however, Dead Beat, you say that...

subtitles.original: もし今桜が散っていたら、このスタジオのすべてのPCが火を噴くと思う。
subtitles.english: ...if sakura was falling right now, I think that- I think that every PC, uh, in this studio would catch on fire.

subtitles.original: いいアイデアだけどね！
subtitles.english: Great idea, though!

subtitles.original: 自撮りタイム！
subtitles.english: Selfie time!

subtitles.original: よし、いくよ。またこのカメラを使うよ。おっと、よし。
subtitles.english: Okay, here we go. Now I'm using this camera again. Whoa, okay.

subtitles.original: 下がってるよ、下がってる。
subtitles.english: You guys can get- I'm backing up, I'm backing up.

subtitles.original: 少し近くで見てみよう。後ろの桜の木、あれは3Dなんだ...
subtitles.english: A bit of a closer look. That sakura tree behind, that's- that is 3D...

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って、いける、これならいける。
subtitles.english: Hold on, I got- I got this.

subtitles.original: あれは3Dなんだよ。
subtitles.english: That- that is 3D.

subtitles.original: みんな笑ってる、笑ってるよ、私を笑ってるな！
subtitles.english: They're laughing, they're laughing, you're laughing, you're laughing at me!

subtitles.original: やめて！
subtitles.english: Stop it!

subtitles.original: ストップ！
subtitles.english: Stop!

subtitles.original: いつかみんなにもっと怒った顔を見せられるようになるから、楽しみにしててね。
subtitles.english: Someday I'll be able to make an angrier face at you, so get ready for that.

subtitles.original: モリ・カリオペがもっと怒った顔を見せられるようになる、それも楽しみの一つだね、Dead Beats。
subtitles.english: That's another thing to look forward to, Dead Beats, when Mori Calliope can make an angrier face at you.
